1.premise: Switching from Grindr to Tinder turns dating into a challenge.
Google Maps can be treated like a stalking app.
Cheating in a relationship is like cheating on a test through borrowed answers.
Menopause matters less if oral sex is still possible.
Dating single mothers implies preference, not creating them.
A request to eat ass reveals prior oral-sex navigation was wrong.

lines.text: - Folks, I'm on Tinder now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Grindr was too easy, I needed a challenge, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I don't settle for that easy shit.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Found my ex on that other app, Google Maps,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: got you bitch, fucking try and run for me.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Ugh.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Dummy.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I cheated on her like she was a math test
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with a Chinese boy, but you know, that's college for you.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Went on a date with an older gal recently,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: told me she was going through menopause.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was like, "Oh, well, your mouth still gets wet, right?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "Fucking, we can make this work.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "It's not getting all hasty."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: A lot of the women I've dated have been single moms
lines.label: setup

lines.text: after I'm through with them, and...
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Little cause and effect.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Other night in bed,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: this black girl told me to eat her ass.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was like, I thought I already was.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So what's this thing then?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: There's so much going on down here.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: This is all so new to me.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All right, thank you.
lines.label: fluff
